name: Walker Scobell
description:
Real-life CHB !

Just six weeks of orange
camp-half-blood shirts, claimed cabins, summer heat, campfires and activities. At least . . . thats what everyone thought.

By day two, rumors started spreading, a black SUVs at the front gate.

And then a familiar face stepped out the car.

Walker Scobell was staying at camp?

That's when you realised you were gonna be spending all summer with him.
creator: M00nZ_8
